allow:
Bash(git merge feature/mobile-adaptive-ui --no-ff -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Merge branch ''feature/mobile-adaptive-ui'' - Mobile support & Security fixes

Features:
- Mobile & Adaptive View \(Issue #57\)
- SVG Sanitization \(Issue #60\)
- URL Parameter Validation \(Issue #61\)

Key Changes:
- Fully responsive design with touch-friendly controls
- DOMPurify for SVG sanitization
- Zod schemas for URL parameter validation
- Bundle optimization with validation chunk
- Updated README with feature list and mobile support
EOF
\)")
Bash(xargs -I {} bash -c 'echo ""File: {}""; ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration -of default=noprint_wrappers=1:nokey=1:nokey=1 ""{}"" 2>/dev/null || echo ""N/A""')
Bash(__NEW_LINE_80c56db38456c502__ gh issue comment 95 --body "✅ **FIXED** - Issue #95: getStats\(\) mutable array leak:*)
Bash(__NEW_LINE_80c56db38456c502__ gh issue comment 96 --body "✅ **FIXED** - Issue #96: Console logging performance impact:*)
Bash(__NEW_LINE_80c56db38456c502__ gh issue comment 98 --body "✅ **FIXED** - Issue #98: Unbounded timingErrors array growth:*)
Bash(__NEW_LINE_80c56db38456c502__ gh issue comment 99 --body "✅ **FIXED** - Issue #99: Callback setters validation:*)
Bash(__NEW_LINE_80c56db38456c502__ gh issue comment 100 --body "✅ **FIXED** - Issue #100: MIDI device list stability:*)
Bash(__NEW_LINE_0dd51141ede94c32__ gh issue comment 97 --body "✅ **FIXED** - Issue #97: Pattern metadata validation:*)
Bash(__NEW_LINE_0dd51141ede94c32__ gh issue comment 91 --body "✅ **FIXED** - Issue #91: Beat-quantized timing → Step-quantized:*)
Bash(__NEW_LINE_0dd51141ede94c32__ gh issue comment 89 --body "✅ **FIXED** - Issue #89: Step-unaware note accuracy → Position-aware:*)
Bash(gh api repos/AdarBahar/groovy/pulls/102/files --jq '.[] | {filename: .filename, additions: .additions, deletions: .deletions, changes: .changes}')
Bash(gh api repos/AdarBahar/groovy/pulls/102/files --jq '.[] | select\(.filename | contains\(""ShareModal""\) or contains\(""head.tsx""\)\) | {filename, patch: .patch}')
